basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) has published the Teaching Assistant Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 Teaching Assistant positions. Candidates up to 28 years of age and holding an M.Sc. or equivalent degree in Mathematics from a recognized university with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent grade (CGPA 6 and above) are eligible to apply. The application process is being conducted through email mode, and interested candidates can submit their applications on or before 25 June 2026. Candidates can access the notification PDF and applic

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years. Age relaxation commensurate with educational qualification(s) and/or experience(s) of the applicant may be considered for candidates having qualification and experience higher than the advertised with the prior approval of the competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Sc. or equivalent degree in Mathematics from a recognized university with minimum of 60% marks or equivalent grade (CGPA 6 and above)
qualification.details: M. Sc. or equivalent degree in Mathematics from a recognized university with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent grade (CGPA 6 and above).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IISER Pune Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IISER Pune Teaching Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IISER Pune Teaching Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IISER Pune Teaching Assistant positions is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Teaching Assistant position, candidates must possess an M. Sc. or equivalent degree in Mathematics from a recognized university with at least 60% marks or an equivalent grade (CGPA 6 and above).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Teaching Assistant position announced by the Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Teaching Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Teaching Assistant post is 28 years. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications and experience, subject to approval.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Assistant role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Teaching Assistant position will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IISER Pune Teaching Assistant recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their complete application to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IISER Pune Teaching Assistant positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Teaching Assistant positions at IISER Pune.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Teaching Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Teaching Assistant posts at IISER Pune typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Teaching Assistant positions at IISER Pune are on a contractual basis. This means the appointment is for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the institute.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the IISER Pune Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
